englishDefinitions: (informal) A person who does small tasks and odd jobs, especially building repairs and the like.
persianTranslation: (غیررسمی) شخصی که کارهای کوچک و کارهای عجیب و غریب به ویژه تعمیرات ساختمان و مانند آن انجام می دهد.
examples: I complained that the heat was not working, and the landlord sent the handyman to fix it.
